createWorkspaceDescription: Workspaces are where your team collaborates. Create one for your team, project, or organization.
name: Name
logoHint: PNG, JPG, or WEBP up to 5MB
nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters
nameTooLong: Name must be 100 characters or less
slugTooShort: Slug must be at least 2 characters
slugTooLong: Slug must be 50 characters or less
slugInvalidFormat: Slug must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
logoTooLarge: Logo must be 5 MB or smaller
logoInvalidType: Logo must be a PNG, JPG, or WEBP file
workspaceLoadFailed: Unable to load workspace settings right now
workspaceSettingsUnauthorized: You don't have permission to edit workspace settings
membersDescription: Manage members and their roles in this workspace
insufficientPermissions: You don't have permission to manage member roles
confirmRemoveMember: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from this workspace?
maxWorkspacesReached: You can create a maximum of {{max}} workspaces. Please contact the administrator or reach out via our <discordLink>Discord</discordLink> for assistance.
workspaceFull: This workspace has reached the maximum of {{max}} members
workspaceFullInvite: Unable to join — this workspace has reached its member limit. Please contact the workspace administrator or reach out via our <discordLink>Discord</discordLink>.
